about.title: About just-eat.ch
about.subtitle: Switzerland's favorite food delivery platform
about.heroText: We connect food lovers with the best restaurants across Switzerland. From Zürich to Genève, Bern to Lugano — your favorite meals are just a few clicks away.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To make every meal an easy, enjoyable experience. We partner with thousands of restaurants across all Swiss cantons to bring you the widest selection of cuisines, from traditional Rösti to international delights.

quality.title: Quality
quality.text: We curate partner restaurants that meet our high standards for food quality, hygiene, and customer satisfaction.

speed.title: Speed
speed.text: Fast, reliable delivery so your food arrives hot and fresh. Our optimized logistics ensure minimal wait times.

choice.title: Choice
choice.text: Thousands of restaurants across Switzerland, offering everything from local Swiss cuisine to international favorites.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.text: We're committed to reducing our environmental impact through eco-friendly packaging and optimized delivery routes.

cta.title: Ready to order?
cta.text: Browse restaurants near you and discover your new favorite meal.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By accessing and using just-eat.ch (the "Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use our services.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.text: just-eat.ch provides an online platform connecting customers with restaurant partners for food ordering and delivery services. We act as an intermediary and are not directly responsible for the preparation or quality of food, which remains the responsibility of the restaurant partner.

account.title: 3. User Accounts
account.text: To place orders, you must create an account with accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the con­fidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

orders.title: 4. Orders and Payments
orders.text: All orders placed through the Platform constitute a binding contract with the respective restaurant. Prices displayed include VAT where applicable. Payment methods accepted include credit/debit cards, TWINT, PostFinance, and cash on delivery where available.

delivery.title: 5. Delivery
delivery.text: Estimated delivery times are approximate and may vary based on distance, order volume, and other factors. Delivery fees are displayed before order confirmation. We strive to deliver your order within the estimated timeframe.

cancellation.title: 6. Cancellation and Refunds
cancellation.text: Orders may be cancelled before the restaurant confirms acceptance. Once a restaurant has started preparing your order, cancellations may not be possible. Refunds for quality issues are handled on a case-by-case basis.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.text: just-eat.ch shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid for the specific order in question.

governing.title: 8. Governing Law
governing.text: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Switzerland. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Zürich, Switzerland.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At just-eat.ch, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in compliance with the Swiss Federal Data Protection Act (FADP) and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

collection.title: 1. Data We Collect
collection.text: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, phone, delivery address), automatically (IP address, device info, cookies), and from third parties (payment processors, delivery partners).

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
usage.text: Your data is used to process and deliver orders, manage your account, improve our services, send relevant communications (with consent), prevent fraud, and comply with legal obligations.

sharing.title: 3. Data Sharing
sharing.text: We share your data with restaurant partners (to fulfill orders), delivery couriers (delivery address and contact), payment processors (payment information), and analytics providers (anonymized usage data).

storage.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
storage.text: Your data is stored on secure servers within Switzerland and the European Economic Area. We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, access controls, and regular security audits.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.text: You have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data. You can also object to certain processing activities and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact our privacy team.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.text: We use essential cookies for site functionality, performance cookies for analytics, and preference cookies to remember your settings. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.text: For privacy-related inquiries, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@justeat-clone.ch or write to: just-eat.ch, Bahnhofstrasse 10, 8001 Zürich, Switzerland.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Get in touch with our team.
